allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); info=d.get\('info',{}\); print\('summary:', info.get\('summary',''\)\); reqs=info.get\('requires_dist',[]\); [print\(r\) for r in reqs if 'gateway' in r.lower\(\)]")
